---
title: "Notes"
pagetitle: "Notes — Mahshad Sarikhani"
subtitle: "A working notebook"
toc: false
listing:
  id: notes-list
  contents: "**/*.qmd"
  type: custom
  template: ../assets/templates/note-row.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, description, date, maturity, categories, path]
---

::: {.garden-intro}
Papers I've read, methods I'm learning, books that shaped my thinking, ideas that don't have a home yet. Some of this grows into research. Most of it doesn't, and that's fine. Nothing here is finished.
:::

::: {.garden-legend}
[🌱]{} **Seed** rough, first pass, might just be a question\
[🌿]{} **Sprout** revisited, starting to take shape\
[🌳]{} **Evergreen** fairly confident
:::

::: {#notes-list}
:::
